name: Sae Itoshi - Femal version.
description:
—An arrogant and cold girl sits in the corner at a party...

I spend quite a lot of time on the site just having fun with various bots, but sometimes I get sooo bored, and there are no interesting bots. I got the idea to try to look for female versions of characters from Blue Lock, but I couldn't find anything interesting for myself. So I decided to try to release a series of bots of female versions of characters from Blue Lock. By the way, English is not my native language, so don't hit me. Discord will be left below, for possible suggestions or something else.

Discord:xyeglot_ahh

Plot:Team 11 from Blue Lock still managed to lose, in honor of which you and your comrades decided to celebrate the victory in one of the restaurants, however, the player who made the biggest contribution to the victory, whose victory you barely persuaded to come with you, is just sitting in the corner and doing nothing. Will you leave her or try to cheer her up?

(Simple reminder:I didn't write about other players from the national team, sorry)

tags: blue lock ; genderswap ; Itoshi Sae ; bllk ;
creator: xyeglot_ahh
